innovation.description: Innovative digital solutions that transform your ideas into growth opportunities.

services.title: Solutions that make a difference
services.subtitle: From idea to launch, we master every step to deliver a product that generates real value.

web.title: Web Development
web.desc: Showcase sites, e-commerce, SaaS — high-performance, accessible, and optimized applications to convert your visitors into customers.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.desc: Smooth and elegant cross-platform apps. Developed with Flutter for a native experience on iOS and Android, including publication.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.desc: Robust architecture, RESTful & GraphQL APIs, scalable systems. Backend solutions designed to last and grow with your business.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.desc: Beautiful and intuitive interfaces designed to convert. Interactive prototypes validated before a single line of code.

seo.title: SEO & Performance
seo.desc: Search engine optimization, Lighthouse audits, content strategy. Be visible where your customers are looking for you.

training.title: Training & Consulting
training.desc: Technical workshops, code audit, and architecture consulting. Level up your skills with our experienced team.

stats.title: Results that speak for themselves
stats.subtitle: Each number represents our clients' trust and our commitment to exceeding their expectations.
stats.testimonial: DB Digital Agency transformed our vision into an exceptional product, delivered ahead of schedule.

vision.title: Building the digital Africa of tomorrow
vision.desc: We believe every African business deserves world-class digital tools. Our mission: to democratize technological excellence.

values.title: Speed of execution
values.desc: Agile sprints, respected deadlines. We deliver fast without sacrificing quality.

values.title: Technical excellence
values.desc: Clean code, solid architecture, modern technologies — we make no compromises.

values.title: Sustainable partnership
values.desc: We are not a vendor, we are your trusted tech partner.

values.title: Measurable ROI
values.desc: Every technical decision is made with regard to its impact on your revenue.

features.title: Own & secure code
features.desc: Your code is 100% yours. No hidden dependencies, complete documentation included.

features.title: Guaranteed deadlines
features.desc: Agile methodology with clear milestones. We keep our commitments, always.

features.title: 3-month post-launch support
features.desc: Three months of free technical support included after each delivery.

features.title: Unbeatable value
features.desc: International quality at local market rates. The best of both worlds.

features.title: Local expertise, global vision
features.desc: We understand African realities and international standards.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: Free 30-min call to understand your needs, goals, and constraints.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.desc: Detailed technical proposal, roadmap and budget within 48h.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: Interactive Figma mockups validated before any code is written.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: 2-week agile sprints with regular demos and adjustments.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Deployment, team training, and 3-month support included.

about.title: About the Agency
about.subtitle: A passionate team creating innovative digital solutions

about.introduction3: We are constantly keeping up with new technologies and best practices to deliver quality solutions.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Discover the experience of those who chose to collaborate with us and transformed their ideas into success stories.

items.name: Sophie Martin
items.content: An exceptional team that understood our needs and delivered a perfectly adapted solution. Their technical expertise and responsiveness made all the difference.

items.name: Mr Patrick Erick MOUAFFO
items.content: Thanks to them, our mobile application was developed in record time without compromising on quality. An agile and transparent collaboration.

items.name: Marie Laurent
items.content: A robust and scalable backend architecture. Our API handles the load perfectly since launch. True professionalism.

items.name: Pierre Moreau
items.content: Design thinking applied to development: an approach that created a truly intuitive and engaging user interface.

items.name: Claire Bernard
items.content: Our organic traffic increased by 200% in 6 months. Their content strategy and technical optimization exceeded our expectations.

items.name: Alexandre Petit
items.content: The customized training transformed our coding practices. Our team is more efficient and our applications more performant.

team.title: The talents behind the success
team.subtitle: A passionate team, experts in their field, united by the same vision: transforming your ideas into exceptional solutions.

ceo.name: Mr Patrick Erick MOUAFFO
ceo.bio: 20 years of experience in development and technical leadership. Former CTO of a tech unicorn, he founded this agency to reinvent client relationships.

cto.name: Sarah Chen
cto.bio: Expert in scalable architecture and cloud. She has led the development of over 50 high-traffic applications.

lead-dev.name: Marc Dubois
lead-dev.bio: Passionate about clean code and best practices. He trains and mentors the technical team to ensure quality.

lead-designer.name: Emma Laurent
lead-designer.bio: Award-winning designer, she creates interfaces that combine aesthetics and performance. Her philosophy: design must serve the user.

lead-mobile.name: Alex Rivera
lead-mobile.bio: Cross-platform mobile development specialist. He has published over 30 applications on the stores.

lead-seo.name: Julie Moreau
lead-seo.bio: Expert in natural referencing and content strategy. She has helped over 50 companies triple their traffic.
